suggestion: The topic is highly relevant and extremely rich, but 'Neurosymbolic AI' is very broad. To ensure a comprehensive *survey paper* (which requires depth), I recommend narrowing the scope by focusing on a specific mechanism or application area. For example: 1) 'Knowledge Graph Integration in Neurosymbolic Models for Reasoning,' or 2) 'Mechanisms for Achieving Explainability in Neurosymbolic AI Architectures.' This focuses the survey while retaining the cutting-edge nature of the topic.
